description: EBCDIC sort key: 'A' < '1' is TRUE (letters sort before digits in EBCDIC, opposite of ASCII).
notes: In EBCDIC cp037: 'A'=0xC1, '1'=0xF1. 0xC1 < 0xF1, so 'A' < '1' is true → WS-RESULT='Y'. In ASCII: 'A'=0x41 > '1'=0x31, so ASCII would give 'N'. Simulates SORT key ordering: EBCDIC sorts letters before digits.
